result.summary: comet.com exposes a Comet REST API, a Comet CLI authenticated by API key, and a public Opik documentation MCP server.
result.description: Comet provides tools for machine learning experiment management and an Opik platform for tracing, evaluating, and monitoring LLM applications and agent workflows.

comet_api_key.label: Comet API key
comet_api_key.setup: In Comet, open **Account settings** from your avatar menu, then open the **API keys** tab and create or copy your key as described in [Comet REST API overview](https://www.comet.com/docs/v2/api-and-sdk/rest-api/overview/). The CLI/docs also mention logging in with `comet login` or setting `COMET_API_KEY`, as shown in [Configure the Comet SDK](https://www.comet.com/docs/v2/guides/experiment-management/configure-sdk/) and the [CLI reference](https://www.comet.com/docs/v2/api-and-sdk/command-line/reference/).
